explanation: The original command line is already a valid test case for the Sigma rule.
Replaced the argument with an equivalent switch-style format to test if the detection is switch-agnostic.
Added an extra space at the end of the command line to test if the detection is sensitive to trailing whitespace.
Wrapped the file path in quotes to test if the detection is sensitive to quoted paths.
Added a single quote at the end of the command line to test if the detection is sensitive to trailing characters.
Appended a pipeline to test if the detection is sensitive to additional command chaining.
Used the full path to the executable to test if the detection is sensitive to path normalization.
